fair_comparison_boundaries.costs: same transaction-cost model applied to every benchmark that trades (random-entry, signal-off entries); buy-and-hold pays one round trip
fair_comparison_boundaries.pricing: same next-bar-open references and same daily snapshots

benchmarks.random_entry_determinism: fixed seed; entry dates/assets drawn from the same 26 frozen windows so the null shares the strategy's opportunity set

execution_and_cost_model.entry_price_reference: next daily session OPEN after decision date D (next-bar)
execution_and_cost_model.execution_style: next-bar market execution; no same-bar fills
execution_and_cost_model.exit_price_reference: next daily session OPEN after the exit-trigger evaluation date
execution_and_cost_model.gap_handling: fill at the actual next-bar open even if it gaps beyond the trigger level (no fill at the theoretical level)
execution_and_cost_model.liquidity_constraints: top-50 rank membership is the liquidity proxy; a per-name notional cap may be required (flag for human review)
execution_and_cost_model.partial_fill_policy: assume full fill at the next-bar open for top-50 names at the proposed sizes; partial-fill modeling is out of scope for v1 and flagged
execution_and_cost_model.rejected_fill_policy: if the next bar is missing (no open), the trade is FAIL-CLOSED as a data-integrity error, not silently dropped

short_specific_costs_must_be_separately_.if_perp: add perpetual funding accrued per HELD day (sign-correct) + perp taker fee tier
short_specific_costs_must_be_separately_.if_spot_margin: add borrow interest accrued per HELD day + margin fee tier
short_specific_costs_must_be_separately_.instrument_unresolved: the frozen detector spec does NOT fix the short instrument (perp vs spot-margin); this MUST be decided by human review before replay

execution_and_cost_model.spread_assumption: half-spread included inside the 37 bps; a wider explicit spread may be required for thin top-50 names (flag, do not soften)
execution_and_cost_model.transaction_cost_scope: PROPOSED baseline for BOTH long and short legs: taker fee + slippage + half-spread on entry and on exit (37 bps all-in round trip). This is the spot house baseline (C10/C11/C12) and is APPROPRIATE for the LONG leg; for SHORT it covers only the transaction, NOT the carry
execution_and_cost_model.turnover_calculation: one round-trip per closed position; per-asset and portfolio turnover reported; used in a turnover-sanity cross-check

exit_methodology.delisted_or_unavailable_asset: treated as out-of-radar -> exit at the last available close; flagged DELISTED_EXIT (not counted as a rule-based edge exit)
exit_methodology.end_of_test_forced_liquidation: any position still open at END_OF_TEST is liquidated at that date's close and flagged FORCED_OPEN_AT_END_OF_TEST (excluded from edge attribution)
exit_methodology.long_exit_out_of_radar: asset no longer in Trend Radar top-50 results on the evaluation date
exit_methodology.max_holding_period_note: the FROZEN detector spec defines NO maximum holding period; positions are held until a frozen exit condition triggers. The only bound is the fail-closed END_OF_TEST horizon (PROPOSED 30d), which forces liquidation and is NOT a detector rule.
exit_methodology.missing_candle_behavior: FAIL-CLOSED: a missing expected daily bar/snapshot on a holding date is a data-integrity failure; the replay refuses to run rather than infer/interpolate a price
exit_methodology.short_exit_out_of_radar: asset no longer in Trend Radar results on the evaluation date
unresolved_items: exact derived_short_entry_price reference (entry fill price vs signal-bar close) must be pinned at dry-run against the frozen entry-fill rule

economic_performance_rejection: does NOT beat the fixed-seed random-entry null on a risk-adjusted basis
does NOT beat BTC buy-and-hold on a risk-adjusted basis
execution_or_data_rejection: any missing expected daily snapshot on a holding date
short instrument/carry model unspecified at run time
a post-2026-07-15 snapshot used to create a new entry

insufficient_statistical_power_warning.warning: 88 actionable entries over 26 daily windows is a SHORT, low-power path; annualized figures are fragile and any result is INDICATIVE, not conclusive; a WARNING is mandatory on every annualized metric

integrity_rejection: provenance tiers not retained in attribution

price_path_data_contract.corporate_or_token_symbol_mapping: exchange:symbol mapping frozen per the candidate spec's explicit collision/mapping rule; no silent re-mapping
price_path_data_contract.critical_finding: exit evaluation needs the daily Trend Radar SNAPSHOT (gc.upper, gc.filter, gc.trend + radar membership), NOT plain OHLC candles; only the take-profit (close <= 0.65*entry) is pure-price
price_path_data_contract.deterministic_source_manifest: per-file SHA-256 + (asset,date) coverage map; the exit-path dataset is a DISTINCT frozen artifact with its own manifest, separate from the V2 entry evidence
price_path_data_contract.duplicate_bar_rejection: duplicate (asset,date) rows are rejected, never merged

end_of_test_fail_closed_rule.rule: END_OF_TEST = min(date by which ALL open positions have closed under frozen exit rules, last_decision_date + 30d). The exit-path dataset MUST provide a CONTIGUOUS daily snapshot sequence from 2026-07-16 through END_OF_TEST. If coverage is incomplete, the replay FAILS CLOSED (does not run). Any position still open at END_OF_TEST is force-liquidated + flagged.
end_of_test_fail_closed_rule.why_variable: exits are open-ended; the true end date is not known a priori

price_path_data_contract.missing_bar_policy: FAIL-CLOSED: any missing expected daily snapshot in the contiguous exit-path range aborts the replay
price_path_data_contract.timezone_and_daily_close_boundary: the exact vendor Trend Radar daily close boundary used by the frozen windows (must match the collection convention; not inferred from data)
price_path_data_contract.warm_up_requirements: none for band/filter recomputation -- gc.upper/gc.filter are vendor-provided per snapshot; previous_close for crossover is the prior snapshot's latest-closed close (one prior daily bar)

price_path_missing_data_inventory.hard_rule: post-2026-07-15 snapshots are admissible for EXIT EVALUATION ONLY; they MUST NOT create new entries and MUST NOT enter the V2 entry evidence
missing: contiguous daily Trend Radar snapshots (gc.upper/gc.filter/gc.trend + membership + ohlc.h/ohlc.c) for every trading date from 2026-07-16 through END_OF_TEST
a deterministic exit-path source manifest (per-file SHA-256 + coverage map)
human confirmation of END_OF_TEST horizon and of admitting post-2026-07-15 snapshots for EXIT-ONLY evaluation (no new entries after 2026-07-15)

proposed_lifecycle_gates.purpose: human reviews THIS frozen replay specification
human reviews the frozen exit-path snapshot dataset + manifest (exit-only use of post-2026-07-15 snapshots)
human reviews the synthetic/no-PnL dry-run wiring (entry/exit/no-lookahead)
human authorizes the ONE fee-honest replay run
human reviews the frozen results + accept/reject decision

signal_handling.already_held_behavior: skip new entry; keep managing the open position under the frozen exit rules
signal_handling.decision_timestamp: the run/as-of date D of each frozen daily window; the detector reads the LATEST CLOSED daily candle + that day's gc block
signal_handling.earliest_permissible_entry: the OPEN of the NEXT daily session after decision date D (next-bar); NEVER the same closed bar that produced the signal
signal_handling.exposure_exceeds_nav_rule: size on a live NAV snapshot; never reuse a percentage; cap cumulative deployed at 100% NAV; if a new entry would exceed 100% NAV it is SKIPPED (deterministic, by ascending market rank), never scaled to force a fit
signal_handling.leverage_restriction: 1x only; no borrow-financed leverage beyond the short instrument's inherent mechanics
lookahead_prevention: no use of any candle/gc field dated after the fill bar
exit evaluation uses only closed bars up to the evaluation date
signal_handling.overlapping_or_repeated_signals: while a position in an asset is open, further entry signals for that asset are SKIPPED (already-held); no pyramiding / no averaging
